messages.reasoningContent:
The user wants a simple pizza dough recipe for 3 medium pizzas, with only ingredients in grams and nothing else.

I don't need to use any tools for this, it's a general knowledge query. I will provide the ingredients.

For 3 medium pizzas (approx 250g-300g dough per pizza):
Total dough needed: ~750g-900g.

Standard ratio:
Flour (00 or bread flour): ~450-500g
Water: ~300g (60-65% hydration)
Salt: ~10-15g
Yeast (Instant): ~3-5g

Let's refine for 3 medium pizzas:
Flour: 500g
Water: 325g
Salt: 10g
Yeast: 3g

Wait, the user said "provide only the ingredients in grams and nothing else".

325g water
10g salt
